questionHtml:
A standing wave is formed on a string. P and Q are adjacent antinodes on the wave. Three statements are made by a student:

I.   The distance between P and Q is half a wavelength.
II.  P and Q have a phase difference of π rad.
III. Energy is transferred between P and Q.

Which statements are correct?

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: A standing wave is formed on a string. P and Q are adjacent antinodes on the wave. Three statements are made by a student: I. The distance between P and Q is half a wavelength.II.
